title: rawgentic multi-issue driver campaign state
description: Schema for a multi-issue driver campaign state file (design #134, #148, #163). The LIVE per-campaign instance is written at runtime to claude_docs/.driver-state/<campaign>.json (disk-persisted working state, gitignored); this schema + the example-*.campaign.json files are the git-tracked contract-of-record. schema_version 2 adds issues[].depends_on (v1 files, which omit it, still validate).

schema_version.description: 1 = original queue; 2 = adds dependency DAG (issues[].depends_on) + epic anchor. A v2 reader must accept v1 files.

campaign.description: Campaign identifier; matches the <campaign>.json live-state filename.

deps_satisfied_by.description: When a dependency counts as satisfied for the advance rule (v2). Default merged.

base_default_branch_sha.description: origin/<default> HEAD when the campaign started (rollback-anchor baseline).

epic.description: Epic issue number whose task list anchors the queue (v2). null for an inline queue.

notes.description: Campaign ledger — dated free-text entries (DEFER surfacing, rate-limit window resets, mid-loop status changes). The state file IS the ledger.

depends_on.description: Issue numbers this issue depends on (v2). Absent on v1 files.

deferred_reason.description: DEFER taxonomy: owner-decision | owner-reserved | cross-repo | budget | cross-issue-dependency.

branch_preservation.description: Deterministic on DEFER: pushed (resumable, ≥1 commit) | discarded (approach abandoned) | none (no commits).
